title: Name That Method
instruction: Which recommendation method is this describing?

items.text: People who liked X also liked Y
This movie has the same actors as one you liked
Users with similar ratings to yours enjoyed this
This song has a similar tempo and mood
Your taste twin just discovered something new
This book is in the same genre you always read
87% of people who bought A also bought B
The description matches your search keywords
Neighbors in the rating matrix rated this highly
Tags and categories match your preferences
